title: SINT Task Report (Action Ledger Event)
description: Ledger event reporting the outcome of an agent action. Written to the Evidence Ledger after action.started, action.completed, action.failed, or action.rolledback. This is the SINT equivalent of a 'task report' — an immutable, hash-chained record of what the agent did and how it ended. Derived from SintLedgerEvent in packages/core/src/types/evidence.ts.

eventId.description: UUID v7 unique identifier for this event.

sequenceNumber.description: Monotonic sequence number. Serialized as string when it exceeds JS Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER (BigInt transport).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision in UTC (e.g. 2026-04-17T07:45:00.000000Z).

eventType.description: Which phase of the action lifecycle this report records. Only the action.* family is considered a task report; other ledger event types (policy.evaluated, risk.score.computed, etc.) have their own semantics.

agentId.description: Ed25519 public key of the agent that executed the action (hex-encoded, 64 chars).

tokenId.description: Capability token used to authorize the action. Optional for reports not tied to a specific token (e.g. an agent-level report).

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Shape varies by eventType but commonly includes requestId, resource, action, outcome fields (bytesWritten, error message, rollback reason).

requestId.description: Correlates the report back to a SINT request that was previously intercepted.

resource.description: The resource the action was taken on (e.g. ros2:///cmd_vel).

action.description: The action performed (e.g. publish, write, delete).

outcome.description: High-level outcome flag. Full detail in type-specific fields.

error.description: Error message when eventType is action.failed.

rollbackReason.description: Reason for rollback when eventType is action.rolledback (e.g. 'estop.triggered', 'constraint.violated').

previousHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous event in the chain (hex-encoded). The genesis event uses 64 zeros.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this event, computed over the canonical JSON of all fields except hash itself. Provides tamper-evidence.

rosclaw_audit_ref.description: Cross-reference to a ROSClaw audit log entry for cross-system CSML computation (arXiv:2603.26997).

rosclaw_failure_mode.description: ROSClaw-classified failure mode when eventType is action.failed.

foundation_model_id.description: Foundation model backend identifier, used for per-model CSML behavioral tracking.
